response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has genuine technical alignment with the stack — TypeScript, React, Node.js, REST APIs — and is based in Berlin satisfying the on-site requirement. However, he is severely overqualified for a Junior/Mid-Level individual contributor role: 15+ years of professional experience across Staff and Senior positions makes a meaningful seniority and compensation mismatch virtually certain. Retention risk is extremely high, and a candidate at this level would likely leave as soon as a more appropriate role surfaces. The technical gaps (no explicit PostgreSQL, no Nest.js) are secondary concerns compared to the structural misfit.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React proficiency directly matching the primary stack requirements
Berlin-based, satisfying the high on-site presence requirement without relocation friction
LLM/AI agent infrastructure work at re:cinq and Kubernetes experience in GISCollective align with the nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Severely overqualified — 15+ years of experience at Staff/Senior level makes the Junior/Mid seniority designation a poor structural fit with high attrition risk
No explicit PostgreSQL experience; relational DB exposure is primarily MySQL, with MongoDB being the more prominent database throughout the resume
Career gap since October 2025 combined with Staff-level compensation history makes salary alignment with an entry-level budget unlikely
